title: EBTA lifecycle archive package
description: Paquet LIFECYCLE_ARCHIVED produit au retrait definitif d'une strategie. Source: SOP 12; DN-041.
x_normative_source: Protocole/PAQUET D'EXECUTION EBTA.md section 2 (G14 checklist); SOP 12; DN-041

retention_expires_at.description: ISO-8601 date after which archive can be destroyed. Minimum 10 years from archived_at per DN-041.

artefact_checksums.description: Map from artefact name to SHA-256 checksum. Must cover all artefacts in the full lifecycle.

withdrawal_reason.description: Documented reason for strategy withdrawal (statistical, economic, operational, or other).

final_verdict.description: Final global verdict at the time of archival.

incidents_summary.description: Summary of significant incidents during the strategy lifecycle.

modifications_log_hash.description: Hash of the modifications log covering the full lifecycle.

oos_access_log_hash.description: Hash of the OOS access log.

archived_by.description: Identifier of the person or system performing the archival.
